description_long: This is a rectangular cardboard box of Aamu Teho coffee, predominantly light blue in color with bold yellow and brown text on the front. The front face features a stylized illustration of a steaming coffee cup, coffee beans, and a rising sun, along with the product name and weight (500g). The sides of the box display additional product information, including preparation instructions, certifications, and branding elements. The back of the box includes a photograph of a person, a humorous blend description (90% Arabica, 10% Perkele), and a detailed product story in Finnish. The box is sealed and designed for retail sale, with clear branding and certification logos. The overall appearance is clean, modern, and visually appealing, suitable for display in urban retail environments.
description: A light blue rectangular box of Aamu Teho coffee with bold branding, a coffee cup and sun illustration, and detailed product information on all sides.
description_view_0: The front view shows the Aamu Teho branding, a steaming coffee cup with coffee beans and a sun illustration, and product weight.
description_view_1: The left side displays preparation instructions, a coffee cup icon, and certification logos, with text in Finnish and Swedish.
description_view_2: The back features a photo of a person, a humorous blend description, a product story, and additional product and manufacturer details.
description_view_3: The right side shows certification information, a UTZ logo, and social media/contact details, with minimal graphics.
attribute_brand_logo: The UTZ certification logo is visible on the front lower left and right side, featuring a red badge with white text. The Aamu Teho brand name is prominently displayed in large yellow and brown letters on the front and sides.
attribute_flavor_indication: No explicit flavor is indicated; the box states '90% Arabica 10% Perkele' and shows a coffee cup, suggesting standard coffee.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: No detailed nutritional facts panel is visible, but the back and sides include product composition and preparation information.
attribute_promotional_graphics: A stylized illustration of a steaming coffee cup and sun is present on the front, and a photo of a person with a humorous quote is on the back. No mascots or special offers are visible.
